caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, peaked wig sits in a studio setting. He wears glasses and black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous small, framed photographs and shelving units holding clothing items, including a garment with the text "LEE" visible. A logo appearing on the screen features a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, gesturing slightly with his right hand as he speaks, with his facial expressions shifting as he talks. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene, focusing on the man as the central subject of the podcast recording.
